macro.title: Homebuying Demand Ticks Up, Mortgage Rates Tick Down
macro.what: More homeowners are putting their houses on the market, with new listings increasing for the second week in a row after five straight months of declines
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Fed Holds Rates Steady, But Rare Dissents Signal Cloudy Outlook For Future Path
macro.what: The Federal Reserve held interest rates steady at its April 29 meeting
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Colorado lawmakers act to reality-check Prop 123 housing targets
housing.what: Nearly four years ago, Colorado voters approved a special fund to address the affordable housing crisis following Covid-19
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: San Francisco’s Luxury Home Sales Jump 22% As Median Price Nears $7M
housing.what: Luxury home sales are surging in San Francisco, the epicenter of the AI boom, pushing the median sale price to the highest March level on record
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: Why LGI Homes is the clearest read on entry-level buyer math
housing.what: A tale of two Spring Selling housing markets set the scene for LGI Homes’ Q1 2026 earnings release this week
housing.why: Supply pipeline sets future inventory and construction activity.
housing.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.

housing.title: The Gathering: How is AI reshaping mortgage lending and servicing?

housing.title: NorthstarMLS, CREB partner with Broker Public Portal
housing.what: NorthstarMLS and CREB joined Broker Public Portal, expanding Cribio.com reach, adding MetroList listings and a new MLS search site.
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: The Reveal in NYC: This ‘One-of-a-Kind’ Apartment Just Off City Hall Park is Now Listed for $2.2 Million

housing.title: Coming Soon in New Jersey: This 3-Bedroom, 2-Bath Fixer-Upper Less Than an Hour From NYC is Set to Hit the Market This Week

notables.title: Atlas VMS launches insurance-backed appraisal warranty for lenders
notables.what: Atlas VMS launched LoanShield, a no-cost appraisal warranty, citing an average loan repurchase cost of $32,288 and ongoing buyback risks.
